title: hieracium schmidtii subsp. vulcanicum
intro: Hieracium schmidtii subsp. vulcanicum is a rare and lesser-known species of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as hawkweed, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Eastern Europe, for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium schmidtii subsp. vulcanicum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. However, there is limited information on herbal preparations, but it is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
